title: Birch Title Screen
description: Makes your panorama more beautiful, immersing you in a birch landscape!
body:
# ![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cf44aed9286c76f5c42975fb5662769de4083bf.png)
This resource pack replaces the default panorama with one featuring a birch biome.
# ![resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GkqmdDKB/images/9a6d95ed49ea0f9c26c9853b9e898ff84a13a35e.png)
This is what the main menu panorama looks like.
